dimensions.label: Relevance & currency
dimensions.description: Are claims current? Data fresh? Examples relevant to today's reader?

dimensions.label: Originality of analogies/cases
dimensions.description: Are analogies and case studies original, not clichéd? Do they illuminate?

dimensions.label: Prose quality
dimensions.description: Rhythm, cadence, flow. Engaging or mechanical? Paragraph cohesion, transitions, sentence variety.

dimensions.label: Chapter balance
dimensions.description: Length balance across chapters. Repetition of examples across chapters. Internal consistency.

dimensions.label: Accessibility
dimensions.description: Can a non-technical reader follow without condescension? Jargon minimized or explained?

dimensions.label: Commercial value
dimensions.description: Would this sell? Hook, compelling titles, engagement, page-turner quality.

dimensions.label: Accuracy & references
dimensions.description: References present and properly formatted? Claims verifiable?
